message:
fix: correctness fixes across c-api, cli, fts5, pager, parser, wal, and conformance tests

Cross-crate fixes addressing conformance gaps and correctness issues:

fsqlite-c-api/src/lib.rs:
- Change current_value() to current_value_ref() returning &SqliteValue
  instead of cloned values, avoiding unnecessary allocations in
  column accessors. Guard against negative column indices.

fsqlite-cli/src/main.rs:
- Fix line comment detection: treat '--' as comment start regardless
  of following character (SQLite behavior). Previous code required
  whitespace after '--', causing 'SELECT 1--2;' to be treated as
  complete when the semicolon was inside the comment.

fsqlite-ext-fts5/src/lib.rs:
- Fix BM25 doc frequency check: test df_int == 0 before casting to
  f64 to avoid floating-point comparison edge cases.

fsqlite-pager/src/arc_cache.rs:
- Fix eviction trigger: consider both entry-count overflow AND
  byte-budget overflow when deciding whether to evict. Previously
  only entry count was checked, allowing byte-based caches to grow
  unbounded. Apply same fix to notify_unpin().

fsqlite-parser/src/semantic.rs:
- Fix function arity validation for FunctionArgs::Star (count(*)):
  pass the FunctionArgs enum directly to resolve_function() instead
  of converting to empty slice, so Star correctly counts as 1 arg.

fsqlite-wal/src/group_commit.rs:
- Replace CAS loop for max_group_size_observed with atomic fetch_max.
- Clean up formatting (unnecessary line breaks).

fsqlite/src/lib.rs:
- Add 9 new conformance gap probe tests covering type affinity
  coercion (017), NOCASE collation ASCII-only semantics (018),
  UNIQUE NULL semantics (019), integer overflow promotion to real
  (020), and savepoint rollback/nested BEGIN behavior (021).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
